title: Day 20: Day 20 — Scaling Your Efforts
content:
# Day 20 — Scaling Your Efforts

## Topic
Building a recruiting system that grows beyond one-off effort

## 3–5 Key Points
- **Move from 1:1 hustle to repeatable systems:** Recruiting gets stronger when it runs on process, not just personal energy.
- **Use a recruiting calendar:** Schedule consistent outreach, follow-up, interviews, and nurturing instead of doing it randomly.
- **Track the funnel:** Measure applications, interviews, offers, and starts so you know where conversion breaks down.
- **Standardize what works:** Turn good scripts, onboarding steps, and follow-up patterns into repeatable playbooks.
- **Scale through people and rhythm:** Over time, recruiting can involve leaders, referrals, and recurring routines—not just one person chasing candidates.

## Why It Matters
If recruiting only works when you personally push every step, growth stays fragile. A scalable system creates predictable hiring momentum, helps you diagnose weak spots, and makes brokerage growth much more durable.
